name: Engage Hub
body: [{"children": [{"text": ""}], "type": "p"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/P5OOAJ1H4WE9/engagehub.svg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/P5OOAJ1H4WE9/engagehub.svg", "name": "engagehub.svg", "type": "image/svg+xml", "size": 9127, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 443, "dateInserted": "2025-08-27T17:18:24+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by "}, {"text": "Engage Hub", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://engagehub.com/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on, contact "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://engagehub.com/contact-us/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Engage Hub"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Engage Hub powers your customer journeys to improve user engagement and communications. Optimise bottlenecks with journey orchestration, engage with AI powered chat bots, SMS notifications, and much more."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Effective"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Implementing SMS as a communication channel can be a cost-effective solution to many of the challenges your business faces today and an ideal opportunity to grow your business."}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Efficient"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Engage Hub offers solutions that enable organisations to implement SMS as a channel quickly and easily. They can solve common problems and tailor to your business\u2019s individual requirements."}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Consultative"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Engage Hub takes pride in being open and approachable, and works closely with clients to help them achieve their goals and objectives."}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Using SMS in Business"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The applications of SMS are almost limitless."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Booking Confirmations"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Market Research & Consumer Satisfaction Surveys"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Internal communications and staff rostering alerts"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Disaster recovery and business continuity communication"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Notifications & Alerts"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Appointment Reminders"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Information Services"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Delivery Notifications"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Loyalty Schemes & Reward Programs"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Promotion of last-minute special offers"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Set up Engage Hub"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Engage Hub have provided instructions to integrate with your Neto control panel on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.engage-au.com/neto-sms", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "their website"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]
